# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

Sure, here's basic PHP code to build an User Authentication system in Wordpress using WP_User class from WordPress core (without any front-end view or controller).  You will have a file named `user-authenticator/class-passwordhasher.php` which handles hashing and verifying the password:
```PHP    PHP   wordPress User Authentication plugin without Views, Controllers etc...     :(                .        )              /\/\/.-.      ;'|_|  _; |'' '' `\\  __/ ,---.--``//`-----.   |__..-"""' """"""  `"``` "" ","
